session.task: Redesign Insights file relationship section: replace force graph with treemap + co-mod matrix + session timeline; extend /api/insights; verify /insights

events.reason: Read insights page and API: ForceGraph uses jittery physics; API builds nodes/edges from traces but limits edges to 80 and lacks directory/timeline aggregates. Plan: extend GET response with byDirectory, topPairs from full edgeMap, fileActivityTimeline from sessionFiles + ordered trace sessions; replace canvas with treemap-style directory tiles, top pairs list with intensity bars, and session×file grid.

Implemented byDirectory aggregation (top path segment), top co-mod pairs from full edgeMap with maxPairWeight, fileActivityTimeline from chronological trace sessions × top files; replaced Canvas ForceGraph with FileIntelligencePanel: directory heat tiles (flex, gradient read/write), ranked pairs with bars, session×file matrix with sticky file column; removed duplicate File Touch Frequency section.
